positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial compass rose surrounded by geometric flora and minimalist constellations. The design must feature thick, clean black line work on a solid background, creating a high-contrast, tattoo-inspired silhouette. Elements include stylized crescent moons, angular stars, interconnected botanical elements (leaves, vines), and directional arrows, all arranged in a perfect circular, mandala-like composition. The style should emulate vintage linocut and modern vector illustration, ensuring sharp edges and perfect symmetry. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, gold, and matte black for maximum print pop and versatility. Central composition, highly detailed yet visually simple for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, writing, messy, low contrast, gradient shading, photo, realistic, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, dirty background
